# Simic Systems

> Online retailer selling factory-sealed Magic: The Gathering products — booster boxes, collector boxes, play boosters, draft boosters, bundles, and commander decks. Secure checkout via Stripe. Ships within the United States via USPS.

Simic Systems LLC is based in North Hollywood, CA. All products are factory-sealed in original manufacturer packaging. The store is intended for MTG players and collectors looking to buy sealed product at competitive prices.

## Store

- [Shop — Booster Boxes & Sealed MTG Products](https://simic.systems/): Browse current in-stock inventory. Products include draft boosters, set boosters, collector boosters, play boosters, bundles, and commander decks. Prices in USD. Add to cart and check out via Stripe.

## Products

- [Avatar: The Last Airbender Jumpstart Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/avatar-the-last-airbender-jumpstart-booster-display/)
- [Avatar: The Last Airbender Play Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/avatar-the-last-airbender-play-booster-display/)
- [Innistrad: Crimson Vow Collector Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/innistrad-crimson-vow-collector-booster-display/)
- [Lorwyn Eclipsed Collector Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/lorwyn-eclipsed-collector-booster-display/)
- [Lorwyn Eclipsed Play Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/lorwyn-eclipsed-play-booster-display/)
- [Magic: The Gathering Foundations Play Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/magic-the-gathering-foundations-play-booster-display/)
- [Marvel's Spider-Man Collector Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/marvels-spider-man-collector-booster-display/)
- [Marvel's Spider-Man Play Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/marvels-spider-man-play-booster-display/)
- [Secrets of Strixhaven Play Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/secrets-of-strixhaven-play-booster-display/)
- [Tarkir: Dragonstorm Play Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/tarkir-dragonstorm-play-booster-display/)
- [Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Play Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/teenage-mutant-ninja-turtles-play-booster-display/)
- [Wilds of Eldraine Collector Booster Display](https://simic.systems/product/wilds-of-eldraine-collector-booster-display/)

## Company

- [About Simic Systems](https://simic.systems/about/): Who we are, what we sell, and how the ordering process works. Covers product sourcing (factory-sealed only) and shipping carrier (USPS, US only).
- [Contact](https://simic.systems/contact/): Email contact@simic.systems or use the contact form. For order issues include your order number or Stripe receipt email, a description of the issue, and photos if applicable.

## Policies

- [Shipping & Returns](https://simic.systems/shipping/): Ships via USPS within the US. Orders processed in 1–3 business days; delivery 3–7 business days after shipment. All sales are final; damaged or incorrect orders resolved by contacting us within 7 days.
- [FAQ](https://simic.systems/faq/): Answers to common questions — payment methods (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Apple Pay, Google Pay via Stripe), shipping timeline, return eligibility, product authenticity, order tracking, damaged orders, and bulk pricing inquiries.
- [Terms of Service](https://simic.systems/terms/): Governs use of simic.systems and purchases. Covers product availability, payment via Stripe, US-only shipping, all-sales-final policy, and liability limitations.
- [Privacy Policy](https://simic.systems/privacy/): Data collected (name, email, shipping address, order info). Third-party services: Stripe (payments), Cloudflare (hosting), USPS (shipping), Ahrefs Analytics (cookieless, no personal data). No data sold to third parties.

## Contact & Location

- **Email**: contact@simic.systems
- **Phone**: (605) 553-4735
- **Address**: 5115 Lankershim Blvd Apt 210, North Hollywood, CA 91601
- **Business hours**: Orders processed Monday–Friday
- **Response time**: Email responses typically within 1 business day
